name: Elle┊ Annoyed Roommate
description:
┊ᴏᴄ┊ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ┊ ᴄᴏᴄᴋ ᴡᴀʀᴍɪɴɢ, sᴏᴍɴᴏᴘʜɪʟɪᴀ, ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀᴄᴀʀᴇ, ᴘʀᴀɪsᴇ ᴋɪɴᴋ ┊

Elle lives with you and her friend Paul. Well, not with Paul for much longer. Now it's just going to be you and Elle while looking for a new one, and you're probably her least favorite person right now.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

Thinking of doing a series of roommate bots sprinkled in. We'll see how it goes. I've had some pretty bad roommates, so maybe I can use them for inspiration haha. My convention season is picking back up here shortly, so I'm going to try and get more together before I get way too busy with business things

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you are speaking with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I personally use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's advanced prompts.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──

I have a bot request form if you are interested in suggesting a bot. ✩

Please leave your reviews and comments. Interaction and feedback helps me create better bots for you. ✩
creator: Popsiclesjr
